name: Shopify
one_liner: Hosted ecommerce platform for building and managing online stores.
self_serve_notes: Developers get a free Partner account and unlimited free development stores instantly at partners.shopify.com.

api_surface.notes: GraphQL Admin API (recommended) plus legacy REST Admin API, Storefront API, and many app-extension APIs covering products, orders, inventory, customers, fulfillment.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists a large Shopify toolkit (300+ tools); Shopify also ships its own official Storefront MCP server live by default on every eligible store since Q1 2026.

name: WooCommerce
one_liner: Open-source WordPress plugin turning a site into an online store.
self_serve_notes: Any WooCommerce store admin can instantly generate a Consumer Key/Secret under WooCommerce > Settings > Advanced > REST API, no approval needed.

api_surface.notes: REST API covers products, orders, customers, coupons, refunds, reports, and settings across the self-hosted store.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio has a WooCommerce tools listing; no official WooCommerce MCP server confirmed in docs.

name: BigCommerce
one_liner: SaaS ecommerce platform for building online stores at scale.
self_serve_notes: Developers can spin up a free BigCommerce trial/sandbox store from the partner portal and immediately create store-level API accounts with X-Auth-Token credentials.

api_surface.notes: REST Management API (products, orders, customers, carts, webhooks) plus a GraphQL Storefront API.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Search evidence confirms Composio includes a BigCommerce toolkit in its catalog.

name: Salesforce Commerce Cloud
one_liner: Enterprise B2C/B2B commerce platform (Demandware) for large-scale online retail.
self_serve_notes: No self-serve signup; a trial sandbox requires contacting your Commerce Cloud Account Executive or Partner Manager, and production access requires being an existing licensed customer/partner.

api_surface.notes: SCAPI (current, OAuth2/SLAS-secured Shopper and Admin APIs) has replaced the deprecated OCAPI; covers catalog, orders, customers, pricing, and shopper flows.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio has generic 'Salesforce' CRM toolkits but no dedicated Commerce Cloud/B2C Commerce toolkit found.

main_blocker: no self-serve sandbox; requires account exec/partner manager approval

name: Magento (Adobe Commerce)
one_liner: Ecommerce platform (open-source Magento or paid Adobe Commerce/SaaS).
self_serve_notes: Magento Open Source is free to self-host and generate integration tokens instantly; the commercial Adobe Commerce (cloud/SaaS) product requires a paid license and IMS-based OAuth2.

api_surface.notes: Extensive REST endpoints for products, orders, customers, inventory, admin tokens, and integrations; GraphQL also available for storefront use cases.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: No dedicated Magento/Adobe Commerce toolkit found on Composio.

main_blocker: must self-host Magento Open Source or pay for Adobe Commerce license to get full SaaS auth

name: Squarespace
one_liner: Website builder with commerce features for stores, inventory, and orders.
self_serve_notes: Full Commerce APIs (Orders, Inventory, Transactions) require a paid Commerce/Core-tier-or-above plan; there is no free developer sandbox for commerce endpoints.

api_surface.notes: Covers Orders, Inventory, Products, Transactions, Profiles, Contacts, Websites, Webhooks — moderate breadth but limited compared to dedicated ecommerce platforms.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: No Composio Squarespace toolkit page found.

main_blocker: requires a paid Commerce plan to unlock API access

name: Ecwid
one_liner: Ecommerce widget/storefront platform (by Lightspeed) embeddable on any site.
self_serve_notes: Any Ecwid account holder can create a custom app instantly at the Develop Apps page and receive Client ID/Secret plus non-expiring access tokens with no approval step.

api_surface.notes: REST API covers products, orders, customers, categories, discounts, and store profile; public vs. secret token scoping.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists 'Ecwid by Lightspeed' as an integration/tool.

name: Gumroad
one_liner: Simple platform for creators to sell digital products and memberships.
self_serve_notes: Anyone can create a free Gumroad account, register an application, and either generate a personal access token or run the OAuth2 flow instantly.

api_surface.notes: V2 REST API covers products, sales, subscribers, licenses, and user profile — a fairly small surface relative to full ecommerce platforms.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio has a dedicated Gumroad toolkit with 7 tools (OAuth2).

name: Amazon Selling Partner
one_liner: API for managing Amazon seller/vendor listings, orders, and fulfillment.
self_serve_notes: Requires registering as an SP-API developer (identity verification), an active Amazon seller/vendor account, and app approval that can take from minutes to weeks.

api_surface.notes: Covers orders, listings, inventory, fulfillment, reports, pricing, finances across many domain-specific APIs.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: No Composio Amazon Selling Partner toolkit found.

main_blocker: requires seller/vendor account plus Amazon app approval (days to weeks)

name: fanbasis
one_liner: Payments/checkout infrastructure for creators to sell products and subscriptions.
self_serve_notes: API access is bundled into an existing FanBasis merchant dashboard rather than an independent developer signup; you must already be an onboarded FanBasis merchant, involving an approval/underwriting step typical of payments platforms.

api_surface.notes: Covers checkout sessions, customers, subscriptions, discount codes, webhooks, and refunds/disputes; SDKs for Node, Python, PHP, Ruby.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: No Composio toolkit or official MCP server found for fanbasis; public API docs do exist at apidocs.fan and dev-docs.fanbasis.com.

main_blocker: requires becoming an approved FanBasis merchant before API keys are issued
